article_title: Update to packaged sales from a manufacturer on-site store

briefs.title: Manufacturers with On-Site Store Endorsement Can Now Sell Packaged Liquor Across Their Entire Site
briefs.summary: BC manufacturers with an on-site store endorsement may now sell packaged liquor almost anywhere on the manufacturing site, including via mobile point of sale. Restrictions remain for picnic-only areas, co-located businesses (unless same licensee), and drive-through-style sales.
briefs.action_required: Review your site layout to identify where packaged sales are now permitted and ensure all sales are attributed to your on-site store endorsement.
briefs.article_title: Update to packaged sales from a manufacturer on-site store
